title: Synthetic passage candidate
description: One generated passage plus its questions — the unit that flows through the gate stack. Produced by the LÄS/ELF generation analysts; consumed by every gate.

candidate_id.description: e.g. las-b1-007: section, batch number, running index. Stable across gate runs.

family.description: Generation family / topic-recipe tag assigned by the analyst (e.g. 'kulturhistoria-lang'). Used for family-level kill statistics and adjudication grouping.

passage.description: The full passage text. Swedish for LÄS, English for ELF. Plain text, paragraphs separated by blank lines.

rationale.description: Generator's own argument for the key and against each distractor. NEVER shown to G-KEY solvers; included in the adjudication package.

generator_meta.description: Free-form provenance from the generation analyst (recipe id, inspiration qids, generation date). Passed through untouched.

_seed.description: Present ONLY on eval-set seeded-defect items. Documents the planted defect. Gate agents must never receive this block — the orchestrator strips it before dispatch.
